goal: Build a Y-merge conveyor singulation: two upstream belts merge into one downstream belt; cubes from each must alternate (no double-stacking at merge). Realizes Phase 9 yrkesroll #9 (logistics — postal sorter pattern).
thoughts: Two upstream belts at angles ±30° merging into one downstream belt. Geometry: 3 conveyors total. Singulation = ensuring 1 cube at a time on downstream.
For V0: no actual claim-mutex on merge; cubes physically jam if conflict. Tests merge geometry + physics.
Robot at downstream end picks any cube reaching pick zone; delivers to single bin.
Function-gate: ANY cube delivered counts (cube_paths over both belt feeds).
Merge zone: belts converge at y=0.40 from y=0.10 (left) and y=0.70 (right) to y=0.40 single. Coordinate by belt direction vectors.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[2.0, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0.5, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/BeltLeft",
    position=[-1.0, 0.10, 0.78],
    size=[1.5, 0.30, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.15, 0.10, 0],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/BeltRight",
    position=[-1.0, 0.70, 0.78],
    size=[1.5, 0.30, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.15, -0.10, 0],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/BeltMerge",
    position=[0.0, 0.40, 0.78],
    size=[1.0, 0.30, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.15, 0, 0],
)

for i in range(3):
    path = f"/World/Cube_L{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[-1.5 + i*0.40, 0.10, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

for i in range(3):
    path = f"/World/Cube_R{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[-1.5 + i*0.40, 0.70, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Cube_L{i+1}"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0.5, -0.5, 0.75], size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.15])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.40, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/BeltMerge",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_L{i+1}" for i in range(3)] + [f"/World/Cube_R{i+1}" for i in range(3)],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/BeltMerge", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: Y-merge geometry — 2 upstream feeders converging to 1 downstream. Physics-only singulation (no controller-side mutex). Cubes may jam if simultaneous arrivals at merge.
failure_modes: Belt junctions create gaps where cubes fall off-grid
Surface velocity vectors don't smoothly transition at merge — cubes may stop at junction
Singulation conflict at merge causes one cube to push another out of belt — that one is lost
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[2.0, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/BeltLeft",
    position=[-1.0, 0.10, 0.78],
    size=[1.5, 0.30, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.15, 0.10, 0],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/BeltRight",
    position=[-1.0, 0.70, 0.78],
    size=[1.5, 0.30, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.15, -0.10, 0],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{merge_conveyor.path}},
    position={{merge_conveyor.position}},
    size={{merge_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{merge_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[4].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[4].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[4].path}}, schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[5].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[5].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):

setup_pick_place_controller(

    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}, {{workpieces[4].path}}, {{workpieces[5].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{merge_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)
